predicates.name: does_not_prove_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person does not provide proof of possessing Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: lacks_union_citizenship
predicates.description: The person is not a citizen of the Union.

predicates.name: not_covered_by_free_movement_law
predicates.description: The person is not covered by Community law on free movement.

predicates.name: present_on_territory
predicates.description: The person is present on the territory.

predicates.name: does_not_meet_entry_conditions
predicates.description: The person does not meet the conditions for entry to the territory.

predicates.name: does_not_meet_stay_conditions
predicates.description: The person does not meet the conditions for stay on the territory.

predicates.name: has_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The person possesses a valid travel document.

predicates.name: has_valid_passport
predicates.description: The person possesses a valid passport.

predicates.name: has_valid_identity_document
predicates.description: The person possesses a valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognized_as_national_by_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The person has been recognized as a national by the national authority of the person's country, and that authority is willing to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: belongs_to_nationality_category_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The person belongs to a nationality category for which the minister may issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure to determine or transfer to the member state responsible for examining an international protection request.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination of the person's situation has been performed.

predicates.name: all_case_circumstances_considered
predicates.description: All circumstances specific to the person's case have been considered.

predicates.name: current_absconding_indications
predicates.description: The indications relevant to absconding are current.

predicates.name: real_absconding_indications
predicates.description: The indications relevant to absconding are real.

predicates.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_stay
predicates.description: After illegal entry or during illegal stay, the person did not submit a residence application.

predicates.name: international_protection_request_not_timely
predicates.description: The person did not make an international protection request within the legally provided time limit.

predicates.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_in_relevant_procedure
predicates.description: The person used false or misleading information in an international protection, residence, removal, or return-at-border procedure.

predicates.name: used_false_or_forged_documents_in_relevant_procedure
predicates.description: The person used false or forged documents in an international protection, residence, removal, or return-at-border procedure.

predicates.name: committed_fraud_in_relevant_procedure
predicates.description: The person committed fraud in an international protection, residence, removal, or return-at-border procedure.

predicates.name: used_other_unlawful_means_in_relevant_procedure
predicates.description: The person used other unlawful means in an international protection, residence, removal, or return-at-border procedure.

predicates.name: fails_to_cooperate_with_immigration_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate with authorities responsible for access, stay, establishment, and removal rules.

predicates.name: previously_failed_to_cooperate_with_immigration_authorities
predicates.description: The person previously failed to cooperate with authorities responsible for access, stay, establishment, and removal rules.

predicates.name: declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_transfer_return_or_removal_measure
predicates.description: The person clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with a transfer, return-at-border, or removal measure.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_transfer_return_or_removal_measure
predicates.description: The person failed to comply with a transfer, return-at-border, or removal measure.

predicates.name: declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with an entry ban that has not been lifted or suspended.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person failed to comply with an entry ban that has not been lifted or suspended.

predicates.name: declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The person clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with a measure less coercive than detention intended to ensure transfer, return-at-border, or removal.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The person failed to comply with a measure less coercive than detention intended to ensure transfer, return-at-border, or removal.

predicates.name: declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_public_order_security_restrictive_measure
predicates.description: The person clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with a freedom-restricting measure intended to guarantee public order or national security.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_public_order_security_restrictive_measure
predicates.description: The person failed to comply with a freedom-restricting measure intended to guarantee public order or national security.

predicates.name: declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
predicates.description: The person clearly indicated unwillingness to comply with an equivalent measure taken by another member state.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
predicates.description: The person failed to comply with an equivalent measure taken by another member state.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom_or_member_state
predicates.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom or another member state that has not been lifted or suspended.

predicates.name: submitted_new_residence_application_immediately_after_adverse_decision_or_measure
predicates.description: The person submitted a new residence application immediately after being subject to an adverse entry, stay, return-at-border, or removal decision or measure.

predicates.name: submitted_new_international_protection_request_immediately_after_adverse_decision_or_measure
predicates.description: The person submitted a new international protection request immediately after being subject to an adverse entry, stay, return-at-border, or removal decision or measure.

predicates.name: concealed_foreign_fingerprints_when_questioned
predicates.description: When questioned, the person concealed having already given fingerprints in another state bound by European rules on determining the state responsible for an international protection request, after submitting such a request.

predicates.name: multiple_applications_or_protection_requests_with_negative_or_no_title_outcome
predicates.description: The person submitted multiple international protection requests or residence applications in the Kingdom or other member states that led to a negative decision or did not lead to issuance of a residence title.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_foreign_protection_request_when_questioned
predicates.description: When questioned, the person concealed having previously submitted an international protection request in another state bound by European rules on determining the state responsible for such requests.

predicates.name: came_for_purpose_other_than_stated_application_purpose
predicates.description: The person declared, or the file shows, that the person came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which the person submitted an international protection request or residence application.

predicates.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The person is subject to a fine for lodging a manifestly unlawful appeal with the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: subject_to_absconding_relevant_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to one of the procedures relevant to assessing risk of absconding.

predicates.name: has_valid_identification_document
predicates.description: The person has a valid travel document, passport, or identity document for identification purposes.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_no_application_or_late_request
predicates.description: The objective absconding criterion concerning no residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay, or an untimely international protection request, is met.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_false_info_or_fraud
predicates.description: The objective absconding criterion concerning false or misleading information, false or forged documents, fraud, or other unlawful means is met.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_noncooperation
predicates.description: The objective absconding criterion concerning current or previous noncooperation with immigration authorities is met.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_noncompliance_with_measure
predicates.description: The objective absconding criterion concerning unwillingness or failure to comply with a relevant measure is met.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_active_entry_ban
predicates.description: The objective absconding criterion concerning an active entry ban is met.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_new_application_after_adverse_decision_or_measure
predicates.description: The objective absconding criterion concerning a new residence application or international protection request immediately after an adverse decision or measure is met.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_concealed_foreign_fingerprints
predicates.description: The objective absconding criterion concerning concealment of prior fingerprints in another responsible-state procedure is met.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_multiple_negative_or_no_title_applications
predicates.description: The objective absconding criterion concerning multiple applications or protection requests with negative or no-residence-title outcomes is met.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_concealed_prior_foreign_protection_request
predicates.description: The objective absconding criterion concerning concealment of a prior foreign international protection request is met.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_other_purpose_than_application
predicates.description: The objective absconding criterion concerning coming for purposes other than the stated purpose of the protection request or residence application is met.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_manifestly_unlawful_appeal_fine
predicates.description: The objective absconding criterion concerning a fine for a manifestly unlawful appeal is met.

predicates.name: has_objective_absconding_criterion
predicates.description: At least one objective criterion for risk of absconding is met for the person.

predicates.name: is_foreigner
predicates.description: The person is a foreigner because the person does not prove Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is a third-country national because the person is not a Union citizen and is not covered by free movement law.

predicates.name: has_illegal_stay
predicates.description: The person is in illegal stay because the person is present on the territory as a foreigner and does not or no longer meets entry or stay conditions.

predicates.name: is_identified_foreigner
predicates.description: The person is an identified foreigner under the statutory identification alternatives.

predicates.name: has_risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: A current and real risk of absconding is established for the person after individual examination, considering all case circumstances and at least one objective statutory criterion.
